📍 Map
The Ceremonies
Saturday, 31st October
The Vintage Aarone Farms · New Delhi

Sangeet & Reception

Music, dance and togetherness

An evening of music, dance and feasting — a warm welcome to family and friends travelling in for the wedding.

6:30 PM Bring out the glitter — wear something that catches the light!
Sunday, 1st November
The Vintage Aarone Farms · New Delhi

Kashi Yatra

The groom’s symbolic pilgrimage

The groom playfully sets off on a pilgrimage to Kashi — only to be lovingly convinced by the bride’s father to return and embrace married life.

8:30 AM Traditional best — keep it classic and comfortable.

Maalai Maatral

The exchange of garlands

Bride and groom exchange flower garlands in a joyful, playful exchange — each accepting the other amid laughter and the blessings of all gathered.

8:45 AM Cheer along as the garlands go back and forth!

Oonjal

The swing ceremony

Seated together on a decorated swing, the couple is gently rocked as the women sing traditional songs — a tender moment of welcome and blessing.

9:15 AM A gentle swing and plenty of joy!

Mangalya Dharanam

The sacred knot · Subha Muhurtham

With the sacred fire as witness, the mangalyam is tied amid the chanting of vedic mantras — the auspicious moment we most warmly invite you to share.

11:30 AM The moment we’ve all been waiting for — come shower your blessings!
— With love —
Shweta & Swarnim
Your presence is the greatest gift we could ask for. We can't wait to celebrate with you.
— Warmly hosted by our families —
Promila & Janvier  |  Sreelakshmi & Narayan
with Neha & Asha
We look forward to your warmth, your laughter, and your blessings as our two families become one.
